title: acer laevigatum f. angustum
intro: Acer laevigatum f. angustum, also known as the compact form of the silver maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Acer laevigatum f. angustum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and acting as a diuretic. The herbal preparation of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
